name: Nike Volleyball Camp at Helix Charter High School (San Diego) - All Skills Camp (June 29–July 3, 2026)
description: Kick off summer 2026 with our fun and energetic volleyball camp at Helix Charter High School! Designed for girls ages 10–17, this camp welcomes athletes from across Southern California who want to level up their game in a positive and engaging setting. Under the guidance of Nike Camp Director Zoe Varela Beltz, players will learn key skills, practice new techniques, and gain confidence through focused instruction and exciting gameplay. Whether you're gearing up for the season or simply love the sport, this La Mesa volleyball camp is a great place to grow, compete, and make new friends this summer! Camps are intense and are for those who love volleyball enough to work hard.
